name: barcody-barcode-scanner-for-anything
description: Monorepo for Barcody with web and admin dashboard
author: Nishan Paul

scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=app-backend && npm run lint --workspace=app-web && npm run lint --workspace=app-admin
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace=app-backend && npm run format --workspace=app-web && npm run format --workspace=app-admin
scripts.format-check: npm run format-check --workspace=app-backend && npm run format-check --workspace=app-web && npm run format-check --workspace=app-admin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=app-backend && npm run type-check --workspace=app-web && npm run type-check --workspace=app-admin
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=app-backend && npm run test --workspace=app-web && npm run test --workspace=app-admin
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=app-backend && npm run build --workspace=app-web && npm run build --workspace=app-admin
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api,web,admin" -c "magenta,cyan,yellow" "PORT=$BACKEND_PORT npm run start:dev --workspace=app-backend" "npm run dev --workspace=app-web -- -p $WEB_PORT" "npm run dev --workspace=app-admin -- -p $ADMIN_PORT"
